heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”Vision plus Lipia Pole Pole Products”][vc_column_text]Lipia polepole is available at the Vision Plus brand store. The customer selects the product they wish to buy, gets registered or self registers themselves, pays within a duration of 90 days at their own pace. After which they receive a congratulations message upon full payment that they use to
check out from the Vision Plus physical store.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”How much interest does Vision Plus Lipia pole pole charge?”][vc_column_text]You won’t pay any extra fees or interest – it’s completely free.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”Who is qualified to use Vision Plus Lipia Pole Pole?”][vc_column_text]Everyone qualifies to use Vision Plus Lipia Pole Pole. No documents needed![/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”Can I change my item within the 90 days?”][vc_column_text]Absolutely! You can modify your reservation by telling our team which item you’d prefer, and we’ll take care of the change for you.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”What happens if the 90 days elapses?”][vc_column_text]Your payment plan continues as normal. Should the price change, you’ll pay the updated price. If your chosen item goes out of stock, you can select from our available options.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”Can I pay for more than 90 days?”][vc_column_text]Absolutely! Create a Vision Plus Goal and pay at your own pace with flexible instalments.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][/toggles][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/2″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][toggles style=”minimal”][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”What if I am no longer able to make the payments?”][vc_column_text]You can either select another item of equal value or get a shopping voucher instead. Just call or whatsapp us at 0724 888 777 to request your voucher – it’s processed immediately and works for any product we carry.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”What happens if the price changes?”][vc_column_text]You’ll need to top up your account to cover the full amount before checkout.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”What is the minimum deposit amount one can make?”][vc_column_text]The minimum amount is Ksh. 500[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”How will I check out a product?”][vc_column_text]Once you finish paying, you’ll get a confirmation message to bring to us. We’ll validate your receipt code and you’re all set![/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”Who pays for delivery?”][vc_column_text]Your delivery fee depends on where you’re located – we’ll let you know the cost. You pay this delivery charge directly to us, separate from your Vision Plus Lipia Pole Pole payments.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][toggle color=”Default” heading_tag=”default” heading_tag_functionality=”default” title=”How much is the delivery fee?”][vc_column_text]We offer free delivery! Expect your order within 48 hours in Nairobi or 72 hours for other locations.[/vc_column_text][/toggle][/toggles][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row
